name: toss-place-fe-superpowers
description: A frontend assignment workflow kit for Toss Place style take-home assignments. It helps with requirement analysis, stack selection, Next.js RSC architecture, Simple FSD structure, API layer design, re-render-aware component boundaries, reliability review, and final submission polish.

interface.shortDescription: Frontend take-home workflows for Toss Place style reliability and architecture
interface.longDescription: A Codex-first skill pack for frontend take-home assignments, especially Toss Place and offline-commerce-like products. It guides requirement analysis, stack selection, Next.js RSC and caching architecture, Simple FSD structure, API layer design, re-render-aware component boundaries, reliability review, offline edge-case checks, and final submission polish.
defaultPrompt: Use this plugin when preparing or executing a frontend take-home assignment, especially for Toss Place or offline-commerce-like products. Start with assignment analysis, then choose the stack, design architecture, plan API and component boundaries, implement carefully, review reliability risks, and polish the final submission.
